title: trevirania calycina
intro: Trevirania calycina, also known as California trevira, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae, native to California and Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Trevirania calycina include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Trevirania calycina can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote healing and well-being.
